breaking_news_suggestions.headline: Dome Model Recycles Its Own Math as 'Predictions' — 11 Caught This Week
breaking_news_suggestions.summary: Audit of dome predictions.json revealed 11 entries that restate dome parameters as independent predictions (8,619 km decay constant labeled as 'wavelength'; 1.574c VA constant labeled as 'Tesla frequency ratio'). These are mathematical tautologies, not predictions. Updated our recycled count from 14 to 25 of 76 reviewable predictions.
breaking_news_suggestions.why_newsworthy: Pattern reveals a systematic inflation strategy: dome generates predictions by relabeling its own fitted parameters. 33% of dome predictions now classified as recycled tautologies.
